test case id: tc-login-001 title: successful login module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter "testuser" as the username. 2. enter "testpassword" as the password. 3. click on the "authenticate" button. expected result: the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard.

test case id: tc-signup-001 title: successful signup module: signup source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid email and password. test data: - email: test@example.com - password: testpassword test steps: 1. enter "test@example.com" as the email. 2. enter "testpassword" as the password. 3. click on the "register" button. expected result: the user is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

test case id: tc-login-006 title: multiple failed login attempts module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user enters incorrect credentials multiple times. test data: - username: testuser - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. enter "testuser" as the username. 2. enter "wrongpassword" as the password. 3. click on the "authenticate" button. 4. repeat steps 1-3 two more times. expected result: after three failed login attempts, the system locks the account temporarily.

test case id: tc-login-002 title: incorrect password module: login source pages: 1 preconditions: user has a valid username but an incorrect password. test data: - username: testuser - password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. enter "testuser" as the username. 2. enter "wrongpassword" as the password. 3. click on the "authenticate" button. expected result: the system returns an error message indicating that the password is incorrect.
